Video.summary: After the war with Mexico, cavalry officers try to steal land from Mexican peasants to establish their own empire.
Video.title: Raiders of Old California

Video.summary: A retired Texas Ranger (Pat O'Brien) summons three old-timers to help him clean up Boulder.
Video.title: The Over-the-Hill Gang

Video.summary: Marshal John Travers investigates the murder of a town's sheriff, makes it his mission to restore order to the town and bring down a bandit called the Shadow.
Video.title: The Star Packer

Video.summary: A singing ranch foreman and his sidekick convince a young British nobleman to keep, rather than sell, the ranch left to him by his late father.
Video.title: Boots and Saddles

Video.summary: Hopalong Cassidy (William Boyd) stops Joe Weiler (Morris Ankrum) from instigating a prairie war between two ranchers.
Video.title: In Old Colorado

Video.summary: The Rough Riders (Buck Jones, Tim McCoy, Raymond Hatton) act like strangers to catch a crooked lawyer.
Video.title: The Gunman From Bodie

Video.summary: Outlaw lumbermen frame a singing cowboy (Gene Autry) ; his friend (Jimmy Lloyd) saves him with a plane.
Video.title: Riders of the Whistling Pines

Video.summary: Ranch hand Tom Shaw (Bob Steele) must face off against a nefarious gunslinger to save his lady love's ranch..
Video.title: The Red Rope

Video.summary: Three U.S. Marshals (Buck Jones, Tim McCoy, Raymond Hatton) work undercover to foil a gang of racketeers.
Video.title: Down Texas Way

Video.summary: Heirs of a radium mine owner face murder attempts. A mining engineer investigates to find the killer and prove his cousin's innocence. The mine's value motivates the crimes.
Video.title: Fighting Westerner

Video.summary: Hopalong Cassidy (William Boyd) and his pals (Andy Clyde, Jimmy Rogers) get the drop on Mexican-border gunrunners.
Video.title: Riders of the Deadline

Video.summary: In their first cinematic outing, Red Ryder and his Indian sidekick help a newspaper publisher clean up her town.
Video.title: Ride, Ryder, Ride!

Video.summary: A gang of poachers must be stopped as they kill and sell game out of season. Roy figures out who the culprits are and goes undercover to investigate further.
Video.title: Springtime in the Sierras

Video.summary: Pat goes undercover as an outlaw to find stolen property.
Video.title: Spring the Trap

Video.summary: Uncle Joe decides to go into the cologne business.
Video.title: Please Buy My Violets

Video.summary: Kate decides it is time for Betty Jo to put down the books and set out to find a significant other.
Video.title: Kate's Recipe for Hot Rhubarb

Video.summary: Betty Jo becomes the first female contestant in the horseshoe tournament.
Video.title: The Ringer

Video.summary: The agents track down a ruthless killer and bring him to justice.
Video.title: Sidewinder

Video.summary: A pair of crooks plans to rob the Cannonball of its bank shipment.
Video.title: The Little Train Robbery

Video.summary: Judge Bean intervenes when the brothers Hart accuse each other of crimes including cattle rustling; the Judge feels something is wrong and wonders about Mr. Welles's involvement.
Video.title: Spirit of the Law

Video.summary: A Syndicate is trying to steal the formula for an underwater explosive.
Video.title: Stolen Dynamite

Video.summary: The judge tries to do a favor for an old friend, but he finds himself involved in a marriage proposal.
Video.title: The Wedding of Old Sam

Video.summary: Ah Sid refuses to translate a map brought to him by Fallon and Keats; Ah Sid escapes their attack to be befriended by Judge Roy Bean.
Video.title: Ah Sid Cowboy

Video.summary: A young boy runs away from home because his father doesn't stand up to his abusive boss.
Video.title: The Runaway

Video.summary: A woman arrives in town looking for her son; Roy finds out that her son is not only in the area, but has become a notorious outlaw.
Video.title: Slightly Prodigal

Video.summary: Bill Davis is killed and the Judge and Jeff track the killers to the Mexico; they are joined by rancher John Gorman, who is suspiciously eager to instantly hang those responsible.
Video.title: The Travelers

Video.summary: Miguel inherits a silver mine from his father, but two con men stake a claim on it.
Video.title: Vinegarone

Video.summary: Judge Bean suspects that Doc Malone's medicine show could be harboring a notorious killer.
Video.title: Bad Medicine

Video.summary: Stoney is charged with stealing a gold shipment and murder of an Indian chief's son.
Video.title: Sawdust Swindle
